node.description: Myung-Hwan Go is a Korean C-Rank Hunter under the White Tiger Guild.
Yu Myung-Han (유명한) is Jin-Ho's father and the CEO of Yoojin Construction.

Igris is one of the first Shadows that Sung Jin-Woo acquired. He was initially protecting an empty throne in an Instant Dungeon where Jin-Woo was doing his Job Quest in the Job Change Quest Dungeon.

After two failed attempts of Shadow Extraction, Sung Jin-Woo convinced him to protect him instead of protecting an Empty throne, obtaining him as a Knight Grade Shadow.

__Guild:__ Hunters Guild
__Class:__ Sword Fighter
__Affiliations:__ Jeju Island Raid Party, [Song Chi-Yul](https://anilist.co/character/136073/ChiYul--Song)’s Dojo (Disciple)

Cha Hae-In is the Vice-Guild Master of the Hunters Guild. She is an S rank hunter and the 9th ranked hunter in South Korea. She possesses the unique ability of mana smell and hates the smell of hunters except for [Sung Jin-Woo](https://anilist.co/character/129928/JinWoo-Sung).

Former Korean S-Rank Hunter. ~!About one year before the events of the main storyline, Eunseok participated in the 3rd Jeju Island Raid alongside Baek Yoonho and Min Byung-Gyu. Unfortunately, the raid went sideways and Eunseok was killed under unknown circumstances.!~

Han Song-I is an E-Rank hunter who quit school after gaining money through the Yoo Jin-Ho and Sung Jin-Woo motley group of party. She is friends with Sung Jin-Ah. She first appeared when Jin-Ah visited Jin-Woo in the hospital but she didn't know him then.
B-rank Hunter and An inspector working for South Korea's Hunter Association, Monitoring Division.
Cho Kyuhwan is a C-rank Hunter and a member of Dongsuk Hwang's raid party.
Hwang Dong-su is an​ S-class hunter who works for Scavenger's Guild in America.

__Class:__ Tanker
__Guild:__ ~!Ahjin Guild (Vice-Guild Master)!~

Yoo Jin-Ho is a D rank hunter and is [Jin-U Seong](https://anilist.co/character/129928/JinWoo-Sung)'s faithful assistant and combat partner.
Park Gi-Sool is a Korean D-Rank Hunter and a good friend of Sangshik Kim. ~!He was tragically killed during the first Double Dungeon Incident when a statue sliced him clean in half from behind.!~
Korean C-Rank Hunter and a member of Dong-Suk Hwang's strike squad.

Gina is an A-Rank mage and was one of the Raid Members in Son Ki-Hoon's Party in an A-Ranked Gate. She has long blonde hair and deep red eyes. Her height is average and she has a very attractive body. Gina has a serious personality this can be seen when she answers Son Ki-Hoon's question about if she was responsible for killing one of the High Orcs.
Choi Jong-In is one of the 10 S-Rank Hunters of South Korea. He is also the Guild Master of the Hunters Guild.

Sang-Sik Kim is a Korean D-Rank Hunter. ~!He was a survivor of the Double Dungeon. He was tragically killed by [Tae-Shik Kang](https://anilist.co/character/181155/TaeShik-Kang) after accidentally witnessing him kill a man during a raid.!~

A-Rank Mage from the Hunters Guild who specializes in summoning magic.⁣ She is straightforward, very meticulous, and believes that the only way to overcome difficulties is by laying out the known facts.
